name: Cabbage-Filled Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems and cut off the tops of the peppers.
2. Remove seeds without breaking the shells.
3. Cut cabbage fine as in slaw.
4. Add salt and mustard seeds to the shredded cabbage.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Place the mixture into the peppers, pressing it in tightly.
7. Replace the tops on the pepper cases.
8. Secure the tops with toothpicks.
9. Place the jars upright in a stone jar.
10. Cover with cold vinegar.
11. Seal the jar and store in a cool place until ready to use.
12. They may be kept for several months before using.
